intro: Between April 22 and 27, 2026, ESET’s telemetry captured 11 events, with a severity mix of one informational, two medium, and seven high alerts. The most-covered threat actors were GopherWhisper, APT33, and LockBit, targeting government, technology, business services, consumer, and energy sectors across Global, Mongolia, Europe, Japan, and the Middle East. The high-severity majority underscores concentrated activity against these diverse regions and industries.
